name: Illusion
summary: Illusionists use magic to weave confounding images, figments, and phantoms to baffle and vex their foes.

granted_power_l1_passive.name: Extended Illusions
granted_power_l1_passive.summary: Any illusion spell you cast with a duration of "concentration" lasts a number of additional rounds equal to 1/2 your wizard level after you stop maintaining concentration (minimum +1 round).

granted_power_l1_active.name: Blinding Ray
granted_power_l1_active.summary: As a standard action you can fire a shimmering ray at any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. The ray causes creatures to be blinded for 1 round. Creatures with more Hit Dice than your wizard level are dazzled for 1 round instead. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Intelligence modifier.

higher_level_powers.summary: Greater invisibility on self for wizard level rounds/day.
